narrative:
Washington township has 1,088 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.8 percentage points.
